calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim Of Jorge Fausto Cruz
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion for an order striking claim. The motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Fo Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
